name: ssp_hosts_example_system
description: Canonical SSP prose modeled on USD00050015_Rev_D_SSP.docx — hostnames, FQDNs, IPs, and environment labels survive normalization (lowercase + strip-leading/trailing-punct). Verifies the load-bearing path: SSP-quality prose in, fingerprint tokens out.

fixture_docs.title: Example System System Security Plan v1.2
fixture_docs.text:
## System boundary

The Example System accreditation boundary comprises the following managed hosts:

  * exsys-jump01.example.local       (10.42.10.5)   bastion host, production enclave
  * exsys-app01.example.local        (10.42.10.21)  primary application server
  * exsys-app02.example.local        (10.42.10.22)  secondary application server
  * exsys-db01.example.local         (10.42.11.5)   PostgreSQL primary
  * exsys-db02.example.local         (10.42.11.6)   PostgreSQL replica
  * exsys-mon01.example.local        (10.42.12.10)  Splunk forwarder collector

Authentication is brokered through the Example Identity Provider (Active Directory + Okta SAML federation). Network egress to vendor management planes (Tenable.sc, Splunk Cloud) traverses the Example proxy at egress.example.local.

Management VLAN: 10.42.99.0/24. Production data VLAN: 10.42.10.0/23.

Environments: prod (the boundary above), iat (pre-prod mirror, separate accreditation), and dev (developer workstations, NOT in boundary).

FedRAMP package: EXSYS-2024-001.
